programme.title: American Night

programme.title: Inside West Coast Customs

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers
programme.desc: 'S8/E4 - Frogeye Sprite'. Mike attempts to double his money by turning an old Frogeye Sprite into a premiership quality classic car to be test driven around the Brooklands Motor Museum.

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers
programme.desc: 'S8/E5 - Saab 9-3'. Mike wants a high performance car with an historic badge, but it's hard to find a Saab 9-3 Turbo at a good price. With tight margins will Edd have any room for manoeuvre?

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers
programme.desc: 'S8/E6 - Dodge Charger'. Mike heads to America in search of one of the finest cars in the US, the Dodge Charger. But such a prestigious car carries a hefty price tag. Can he make a profit?

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers
programme.desc: 'S8/E7 - DeLorean'. Mike has travelled to the US to hunt for a DeLorean, one of the most recognisable and distinctive cars ever made. Can Edd restore this iconic car and maximise their profit?

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers
programme.desc: 'S8/E8 - Chevy Truck'. Mike is in San Francisco looking for a classic Chevrolet Step Side Pick Up. Will he manage to find a rust-free model for Edd to restore?

programme.title: Wie weet wat?
programme.desc: 'S1/E33'. Cobus, Jaco en Francois sal mekaar wil uitstof om verder in die reeks te vorder. Wie gaan aan die einde van drie rondes die oorhand kry? Dit is ook weer 'n geleentheid om meer geld te maak.

programme.title: Wie weet wat?

programme.title: Wie weet wat?

programme.title: Wie weet wat?
programme.desc: 'S1/E36'. Jaco, Eugene en Amelda het nie te waffers gevaar in hul vorige keer op Wie weet wat nie. Hulle kry egter nou die geleentheid om op te maak daarvoor. Daarmee kan hulle ook meer geld maak.

programme.desc: 'S1/E8'. Christellee is sterk, stil en vol gees - maar haar braaikamer het 'n bietjie kleur nodig. Leanie en Ruan gee vir haar 'n groen braaikamer met persoonlikheid én genoeg plek vir haar honde-kinders om saam te kuier.

programme.title: Kies 'n kamer
programme.desc: 'S1/E8'. Van 'n tulpstoel tot 'n balstoel, ons sit hierdie week in styl! Kom ontwerp 'n vertrek om 'n stoel saam met ons. Gee vir jou ou stoel 'n nuwe gevoel met ons lekker selfdoenwenke!

programme.title: Wie weet wat?
programme.desc: 'S1/E34'. Amelda, Johan en Darren sal wil seker maak hulle weet meer as die ander in hierdie episode. Kyk ook hoe hulle mekaar se swakplekke probeer uitbuit om wenner van die episode te wees.

programme.title: Wie weet wat?
programme.desc: 'S1/E35'. Liza, Eugene en Abrie kyk in hierdie episode wie die oorhand oor mekaar gaan kry. Vir wie gaan die aanbieder, Abduragman Adams, aan die einde van drie rondes as wenner aankondig?

programme.title: Wie weet wat?
programme.desc: 'S1/E36'. Jaco, Eugene en Amelda het nie te waffers gevaar in hul vorige keer op Wie weet wat nie. Hulle kry egter nou die geleentheid om op te maak daarvoor. Daarmee kan hulle ook meer geld maak.

programme.title: Aneeka se kombuis
programme.desc: 'S1/E6'. Jy hoef nie buite te staan vir braaigeure nie! Aneeka maak haar go-to hoenderpita in die kombuis, en oom Ian sluit aan met sy famous oxtail-pot. Dis gaskoeldrank, speserye en stories in Aneeka se kombuis.

programme.title: Kom Ons Braai
programme.desc: 'S12/E7'. Ons gunstelingtydverdryf is nou 'n sosiale eksperiment. Drie paartjies wat mekaar nie ken nie, braai by mekaar en heelwat gebeur om die vuur. En ons praat nie net van die lekker kos nie!

programme.title: Kom Ons Braai

programme.title: Hier Sit Die Manne
programme.desc: 'S9/E2'. Ons kuier saam met die jong avonturier Linda Viljoen, wat haar sosiale media gebruik om Suid Afrikaners aan te spoor om ons land te verken. Alwyn en Ruhan gee vir ons maklike biokinetiese oefeninge.

programme.title: Gesels
programme.desc: 'S5/E3'. Hulle is die definisie van veggees - Leandie gesels met Tamlyn Wessels en Lianti Coetzee. Herman maak seker dat jou spogbraai die perfekte nagereg het, en Marika wys hoe om 'n pragfoto te neem.

programme.title: Die Babbelbende
programme.desc: 'S1/E11'. 'n Opvoedkundige kinderprogram in Afrikaans. Paloeka die leeu, Palawa die kameelperd, Bibi en Ben antwoord maats se interessante vrae oor ons wonderlike wêreld. Hulle leer ook meer oor woorde en gesegdes, somme en gevoelens.

programme.title: Klein Sake, Groot Drome
programme.desc: 'S3/E3'. Rocket Distillery, SmartScience en okracandle lig Armand hierdie week in oor hoe hul besigheidsukses vlamgevat het.

programme.title: Hier Sit Die Manne
programme.desc: 'S9/E2'. Ons kuier saam met die jong avonturier Linda Viljoen, wat haar sosiale media gebruik om Suid Afrikaners aan te spoor om ons land te verken. Alwyn en Ruhan gee vir ons maklike biokinetiese oefeninge.

programme.title: Lig: God se krag in my krisis
programme.desc: 'S1/E12'. Kyk vandag na die getuienisse van Garrow Coetzee, Francis Loubser en Annabele van Wyk. Hulle deel onderskeidelik hul reis met verslawing, wanneer jou ongebore baba se lewe in die weegskaal is en kinderkanker.

programme.title: Dorpie-doenlys
programme.desc: 'S1/E1'. Van bekroonde restaurante en wynplase tot gesellige blyplekke en ryk geskiedenis - ons wys jou alles wat Franschhoek besonders maak. Of jy nou 'n fynproewer, wynliefhebber of avontuurlustige reisiger is - Franschhoek wag op jou!

programme.title: Klein Sake, Groot Drome
programme.desc: 'S3/E1'. In dié episode kuier Armand by entrepreneurs wat dit regkry om voluit in kleur te lewe. Armand gesels met Coral Bloom, Nici-Lené Accessories & Gifts en Lead with Love.

programme.title: Mooi: Frankryk
programme.desc: 'S2/E4'. Anet besoek 'n Franse vlooimark saam met ou vriende. By dié brocante spoor hulle antiekstukke op wat Anet en Louis se nuwe projek op die dorp afrond tot die perfekte Franse plattelandse styl!

programme.title: Huisgenoot: Ware Lewensdramas
programme.desc: 'S14/E12'. Die legende van Tolla van der Merwe strek oor dekades en die hoeveelheid mense wat hy oor die jare laat lag en vermaak het strek sekerlik tot in die miljoene.Tog was hy ook 'n saggeaarde, familie-man.

programme.title: Huisgenoot: Ware Lewensdramas
programme.desc: 'S14/E13'. Voormalige Pastoor Keith Bird, vermoor eers sy eie verloofde, en paar maande later nog 'n onskuldige jong vrou. Steeds is sy skrikbewind nie verby nie en nog onskuldige dames word sy slagoffers.

programme.title: Huisgenoot: Ware Lewensdramas
programme.desc: 'S15/E1'. Die geliefde Charl Munnick wat die samelewing opgehelder het met sy liefdadigheid, word tydens 'n rooftog in sy juwelierswinkel koelbloedig doodgeskiet. Vier mans is vir die moord en roof gearresteer.

programme.title: Huisgenoot: Ware Lewensdramas
programme.desc: 'S15/E2'. Lede van die SAPD word daagliks in die spervuur geplaas. Sersant Mario Nel het een oggend sy gesin gegroet en is ure later deur Andile Nyoka, wat op parool vrygelaat is, koelbloedig vermoor.

programme.title: Mooi: Frankryk
programme.desc: 'S2/E1'. In hierdie episode kuier Anet by Jacques en Annelie van Schalkwyk. Hul huis en tuin in die middel van die dorp is sprokiesagtig en bied vir hierdie eks-Suid-Afrikaners 'n perfekte somer-vakansiehuis in Europa.

programme.title: Tydlose Skoonheid
programme.desc: 'S1/E1'. Gewone mense deel die inspirerende stories van hoe 'n gesonde leefstyl asook Zinplex-produkte hulle gehelp het om ouerword met meer elegansie en moed aan te pak.

programme.title: Landbouweekliks
programme.desc: 'S29/E9'. Pietman, Johnny en Vicky besoek besonderse boere regoor Suid-Afrika en hou kykers op hoogte van die jongste verwikkelinge in die landboubedryf.

programme.title: Kies 'n kamer
programme.desc: 'S1/E9'. Vele dinge kan dien as inspirasie. Kom ontwerp 'n slaapkamer saam met ons, geïnspireer deur 'n kunstenaar na aan die harte van ons nasie.

programme.title: Huisgenoot: Ware Lewensdramas
programme.desc: 'S16/E4'. Op 'n aand in 2013 daag Kirsty Theologo en haar vriendin Bronwyn Grammar met erge brandwonde by die huis op.

programme.title: Kelderklas
programme.desc: 'S2/E3'. JP en Angelique Gerber bestee die dag saam. Hulle begin vroeg by Knorhoek met 'n wynproe, maar gelukkig is die tweede plaas, Quoin Rock, slegs 'n paar meter weg. Dis geen wonder die dag het geëindig soos wat dit het nie!

programme.title: Drukkoker
programme.desc: 'S1/E11'. Die finale vennootskap, Ashley en Nicola, kry hul beurt om die Drukkoker-restaurant te bestuur. Met die ranglys amper vol, is die druk op kookpunt. Een span sal uiteindelik die kompetisie verlaat ná die laaste uitdaging.

programme.desc: Jessica falls in love with Mbachu, but Nelson's money stole her away from him. This love is sweet until Jessica's mother did the unthinkable.

programme.desc: Prince Ikemefuna pretends to be crippled, hoping to find someone who would love him for who he truly is, not for his status.

programme.desc: Osinachi is being tormented by her mother and sister because of her upright way of life, but things are about to change as her ways turns her life around.

programme.title: Ben Fogle: Return To The Wild
programme.desc: 'S4/E2 - Revisit: Portugal'. Ben revisits Alex, living in the mountains of central Portugal, discovering Alex has followed his dream of creating a retreat and made significant progress with the infrastructure on his land.

programme.title: Life Below Zero
programme.desc: 'S11/E17 - Run Aground'. Alaskans are in the home stretch of preparing for the upcoming winter.

programme.title: Seven Worlds, One Planet
programme.desc: 'S1/E7 - Africa'. The latest series from the BBC and Sir David Attenborough explores the continent of Africa - home to the greatest wildlife gatherings on Earth. But even in this land of plenty, wildlife faces huge challenges.

programme.title: Where The Wild Men Are With Ben Fogle
programme.desc: 'S10/E2 - California'. A couple from Salt Lake City, Utah, decide to move to the mountainous coast of Shelter Cove, California.

programme.title: Life Below Zero
programme.desc: 'S7/E19 - The New World'. Sue travels to the Arctic National Wildlife Refuge. Ricko hunts moose. Jessie builds a cabin in Brushkana. The Hailstones all gather in Kiwalik.

programme.title: World's Most Scenic Railway Journeys
programme.desc: 'S5/E10 - Australia'. Celebrating the wonders of Queensland, we travel over 1,000 miles from Brisbane to Cairns onboard one of the most advanced trains in the world.

programme.title: Exploring India with Bettany Hughes
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - The South'. Bettany enjoys the breath-taking journey through the Tamil Nadu hills, between Mettupalayam and Udhagamandalam (Ooty).

programme.title: Walking With Dinosaurs
programme.desc: 'S1/E5 - The Journey North'. The epic tale of a Pachyrhinosaurus herd, one of the largest dinosaur groups that ever lived, through the eyes of its young member Albie.

programme.title: Great Asian Railway Journeys
programme.desc: 'S1/E7 - Yogyakarta to Surabaya'. Beginning in Java's royal city, Yogyakarta, Michael Portillo visits the Sultan's Palace and witnesses the ancient art of shadow puppetry, known as wayang.

programme.title: Ancient Egypt By Train
programme.desc: 'S1/E1'. Starting in Alexandria, Alice searches for Cleopatra, discovers how the Romans and the Greeks reacted to the treasures of Ancient Egypt, and learns how a slave became a sultan and built his own caste

programme.title: Engineering Reborn
programme.desc: 'S1/E6'. First constructed in the 1930s, the West Side Line - an elevated viaduct section of the New York Central Railroad - was abandoned in the 1980s. But since 2009 it's been totally revitalised.

programme.title: Walking With Dinosaurs
programme.desc: 'S1/E6 - Island of Giants'. The tale of the colossal Lusotitan. Living 150 million years ago on an island known as the Iberian Mesta, now in Portugal, this 25-metre-long titan dwarfed every other dinosaur in the region.

programme.title: Ben Fogle: Return To The Wild
programme.desc: 'S4/E3 - Revisit: County Mayo'. Ben revisits his old friends Georg and Bettina, who live on a remote bogland in County Mayo. They found solace in the wilds of Ireland, but three years later, they are still weighing up options.

programme.title: Life Below Zero
programme.desc: 'S11/E18 - Beyond the Tundra'. With summer nearing its end, Alaskans kick into high gear.

programme.title: Ancient Egypt By Train
programme.desc: 'S1/E2'. Alice arrives in Cairo by train with a book she first read as a youth: A Thousand Miles Up the Nile by Victorian Egyptologist Amelia Edwards. Alice follows Edwards' footsteps to the Great Pyramids.

programme.title: Great Asian Railway Journeys
programme.desc: 'S1/E7 - Yogyakarta to Surabaya'. Beginning in Java's royal city, Yogyakarta, Michael Portillo visits the Sultan's Palace and witnesses the ancient art of shadow puppetry, known as wayang.

programme.title: Blindspots
programme.desc: 'S1/E7 - Germany'. James and his sister visit Frankfurt and Mainz, enjoying beer and brats and exploring Germany's infrastructure of support for the visually impaired.

programme.title: Blindspots
programme.desc: 'S1/E8 - Switzerland'. James and his sister travel to Zurich and try out prototypes of new technological solutions for accessibility. They venture to a peak in Davos for an evening in an igloo.

programme.title: Beyond The Spotlight
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Shaquille O'Neal'. Shaquille O'Neal went from being poor and bullied - and becoming a bully himself - to fame in the NBA. The greatest influence on Shaq's life was his step-father.

programme.title: Beyond The Spotlight
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - Kristen Bell'. At 19, on a missionary trip to a clinic in Brazil, Kristen Bell helped to deliver two babies. The experience ignited her nurturing nature, which endures today in good works like the snack bars 'This saves lives'.

programme.title: Faster!
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - The Highway'. Modern highway systems have turbocharged the global economy, transformed the world's landscape and revolutionized the way people all over the world think.

programme.title: Faster!
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - The Elevator'. They're the backbone of the modern city and they've shaped the world around us. But, have you ever thought about whether elevators are actually saving us time?

programme.desc: 'S5/E13 - The Boss Nine'. Auctions America offers a 1964 Chevrolet Impala SS with a 409 V8 and Keith and Josh can't resist taking a look.

programme.title: Extraordinary Humans
programme.desc: 'S2/E3 - Igor Zaripov'. Thom heads to Nevada, to find a man who defies human biology. Igor Zaripov performs mindblowing feats of power using only the might of his jaw.

programme.title: Extraordinary Humans
programme.desc: 'S2/E4 - Scott Flansburg'. Thoms in Nevada, tracking down world recordholding mathlete Scott Flansburg, whos able to crunch numbers faster than a calculator.

programme.title: Extraordinary Humans
programme.desc: 'S2/E5 - Jerry Miculek'. Thom heads to Louisiana to meet Jerry Miculek, the human machine gun who can fire a handgun faster than an automatic weapon.

programme.title: Extraordinary Humans
programme.desc: 'S2/E6 - Dean Karnazes'. Thom Hunt heads to Nevada, to meet Dean Karnazes, an ultramarathon runner who's taken endurance running to a level that defies human biology.

programme.title: Bright Now
programme.desc: 'S1 - Fire Ant Invasion'. The fire ant strikes fear in all those who cross its path, and with good reason: this ant is taking over the world. A colony can contain up to 40 million individuals.

programme.title: Bright Now
programme.desc: 'S1/E42 - Bay of Crocs'. The Cuban crocodile is an endangered species poised to disappear. Meet the people trying to save this unique animal from extinction.

programme.title: Bright Now
programme.desc: 'S1/E51 - Night At The Aquarium'. Have you ever wondered what happens behind closed doors at zoos and aquariums? What do the animals do when no one is around to watch them?

programme.title: Bright Now
programme.desc: 'S1/E64 - Iberian Lynx: Saving The World's Most Endangered Cat'. Today, a group of scientists and conservationists are battling to repopulate the species, giving hope that these elusive animals may one day make a comeback.

programme.title: Planet Insect
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - Part Three: Hive Minds'. The evolution of super-colonies allowed social insects to dominate the planet. We show how they arose and why they're so important to our own survival.

programme.title: Animal Tales
programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - Animals At Night'. When our busy days wind down, a secret world of wildlife begins to wake up.

programme.title: Animal Tales
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - The Mystery Of The Belugas'. The Arctics beluga whales are so vocal they have been nicknamed the canaries of the sea.

programme.title: Animal Tales
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - Kiwis And Keas'. New Zealand is a place of incomparable beauty and home to rare and ancient birds like flightless kiwis and the kea parrot.

programme.title: Animal Tales
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - Australias Possum Wars'. People in Australias cities cant decide how they feel about their closest neighbours, the brushtailed possums.

programme.title: Age Of Big Cats

programme.title: Age Of Big Cats

programme.title: Bright Now
programme.desc: 'S1/E22 - Explosion of Life'. From wildflower blooms in the desert to large colonies of jellyfish off of Monterey and unbelievable glow in the dark waves, this is California at its finest.

programme.title: Bright Now
programme.desc: 'S1/E70 - Catching Florida's Apex Predator'. Top trappers from Florida Fish and Wildlife go to battle each day against dangerous nuisance alligators that lurk beneath the lush lakes and canals of Palm Beach.

programme.title: Bright Now
programme.desc: 'S1 - Tastes Like T-Rex'. Modern birds are the most direct descendants of some of the most iconic dinosaurs to ever walk this planet. But can science really enable us to alter chicken embryos?

programme.title: Bright Now

programme.title: Octonauts
programme.desc: 'S2/E1'. While Kwazii and Peso have their hands full babysitting a bunch of Adelie penguin chicks, Captain Barnacles must rescue the chicks' parents from a perilous sea storm!

programme.title: Octonauts
programme.desc: 'S2/E2'. It's Sea Snakes on an Octopod when a poisonous sea krait lays her eggs in the garden pod, just as Captain Barnacles has to navigate the ship past a treacherous whirlpool.

programme.title: Clangers
programme.desc: 'S3/E1 - The Visitor'. A space module lands on the Clangers planet, from which steps a human astronaut.

programme.title: JoJo & Gran Gran
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - It's time to post a picture'. JoJo has drawn a picture to show Great Gran Gran over a video call, but just as she's about to show it, the internet goes down!

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S3/E105 - Obstacle Course'. Chilli sets up an obstacle course in the backyard, but Bluey is disheartened when Bandit turns it into a race and beats her.

programme.title: Supertato
programme.desc: 'S1/E17 - The Good, the Bad and the Prickly'. Prickly Pear arrives in the Supermarket and tries to take over Evil Pea's freezer. Supertato discovers that Prickly Pear isn't mean at all and just needed some good friends.

programme.title: Supertato
programme.desc: 'S1/E18 - The Great Book Rescue'. Evil Pea takes all the books from the Supermarket. Supertato, Chilli and Carrot try to rescue all the books by using acrobatic skills they learnt from their favourite circus book.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S3/E107 - Omelette'. Bingo is helping Mum make an omelette for Dad's birthday breakfast, but cracking eggs is harder than it looks, and Dad is getting hungrier by the minute.

programme.title: Octonauts
programme.desc: 'S2/E18'. When two young leafy sea dragons are accidentally separated from their father and brought onboard the Octopod, the Octonauts must find them before they end up in Kwazii's stew!

programme.title: Octonauts
programme.desc: 'S2/E19'. Running out of air, Barnacles struggles to free his paw from the mouth of a giant clam, while simultaneously directing his crew in a delicate Manatee rescue operation.

programme.title: Go Jetters
programme.desc: 'S3/E16 - Mariana Trench: The Pacific Ocean'. With the help of his hero Ron Allum, Lars plans to dive to the bottom of the Mariana Trench in a submersible called the Deep Sea Challenger.

programme.title: Octonauts
programme.desc: 'S2/E20 - Episode 20'. When a gigantic saltwater crocodile wanders into freezing waters, the Octonauts must figure out how to get the predator back to his warm water home - without anyone getting hurt.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S3/E115 - Housework'. Mum and Dad vow to only finish their boring housework when the kids stop acting silly, but that's never going to happen, so they end up trying the same approach themselves.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club
programme.desc: 'S1/E3'. It's fun on the counting train until Naughty Monkey starts to drive! Ethel makes a shape, Frog drops beats with a ribbit song, and Enid turns into anime to chase after a mouse.

programme.title: Mister Maker's Arty Party
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - Drips And Drops'. In the Party Pad the Mini Makers from Manchester find out how to make some amazing drippy flowers, and discover how Jackson Pollock used drips and drops to make marvellous masterpieces.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S1/E40 - Early Baby'. Bluey's playgroup is at odds when Indy's baby hospital collides with Rusty's knights and dragons. But in explaining themselves, they both find that their games actually have a lot in common.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S1/E41 - Mums and Dads'. When Indy and Rusty play Mums and Dads, they can't agree on who should go to work, so they part company. Indy has a hard time finding a babysitter, while Bluey makes Rusty her baby.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S1/E42 - Hide and Seek'. It's time for a family game of hide and seek. Everyone hides, while Bluey counts to twenty, but will she be able to stay focused on the game and not get distracted by all her toys.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S1/E43 - Camping'. While on a camping holiday, Bluey makes a new friend named called Jean-Luc. Bluey may not understand him, but they find a common language playing and hunting for a wild Daddy pig.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S1/E44 - Mount Mumandad'. Bingo and Bluey have five minutes to bed, just enough time to race to the summit of Mount Mumandad. But for them, facing powerful storms, avalanches and stinky spots will take teamwork.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S1/E45 - Kids'. A quick trip to the shops proves tricky for Dad, when Bingo and Bluey want to play a game of 'Kids'. Now Bluey is Mum, Bingo's her baby and for Dad however, he is a very naughty boy.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S1/E46 - Chickenrat'. It's bedtime and Bingo can't remember where she left her beloved Floppy. Retracing their steps, Bingo and Bluey lead their Mum through their bizarre day in the hope of tracking her down.

programme.title: Swashbuckle
programme.desc: 'S7/E1'. In this episode Captain Captain returns to her beloved Scarlet Squid (much to the surprise of Gem) and has brought along two brand new pirates, Sandy and Seaweed, to help win those jewels back.

programme.desc: 'S7/E2'. In this episode the new pirates Sandy and Seaweed have caught the rhyming lurgy of the Ancient Mariner and can only speak in rhyme!

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - Hospital'. Doctor Bluey is needed when Dad gets a very curious x-ray from Nurse Bingo. It seems he has a cat in his tummy!

programme.desc: 'S2/E53 - Hammerbarn'. On a trip to Hammerbarn, Bluey and Bingo create their own mini-homes side-by-side in the trolley. But Bluey quickly gets jealous of her neighbour, Bingo.

programme.title: Swashbuckle
programme.desc: 'S4/E5 - Reckless with a Necklace'. Captain Captain hands Cook and Line an old looking necklace and asks them to deal with it. Captain Captain declares she wants the necklace cleaning and looking as good as new!

programme.title: Mister Maker Comes To Town
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - Circle Print Picture'. Join Mister Maker to discover how lots of old lids can print a super circle picture, and watch out for some pirate pranks!

programme.title: Mister Maker's Arty Party
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - Purple'. In the Party Pad the Mini Makers from Glasgow find out how to make a sparkly galaxy that glitters, and discover how, in ancient times, sea snails were used to create the colour purple.

programme.title: Go Jetters
programme.desc: 'S3/E15 - Go Jetter or No Jetter?'. Foz starts to think his team doesn't need him anymore. Can Tala convince him he still has what it takes to be a Go Jetter, or will he follow Glitch down a different path?

programme.title: Go Jetters
programme.desc: 'S3/E42 - Floating Farms, Bangladesh'. Glitch's trip to a funky floating farm becomes a rescue mission on a fast-flowing river.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S3/E12 - Sheep Dog'. Dad agrees to play Sheepdog with Bluey and Bingo to stop them from disturbing Mum who is taking a well-earned rest, but looking after a sheep is harder work than they expected.

programme.title: Supertato
programme.desc: 'S1/E10 - Banana's Star Appeal'. Banana superstar's show is stopped when Pea steals his peel. Supertato races against Evil Pea to get it back but trouble hits when a giant Banana statue collapses onto the stage.

programme.title: Roots and Fruits
programme.desc: 'S2/E5 - Avocado'. The fabulous Avocados sing an operatic piece in their three unique voices.

programme.title: Roots and Fruits
programme.desc: 'S1/E6'. Live from the Roots & Fruits theatre, it's Pumpkin demonstrating incredible strength and attempting to break a Roots & Fruits record.

programme.title: Supertato
programme.desc: 'S2/E2 - Speedy Pea'. Evil Pea steals Supertato's brand new Tato Car but doesn't realise that the Grape Kids are in the back seat. Supertato has to get the Grape Kids back to safety and save his car.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club
programme.desc: 'S1/E12'. Water, water, everywhere - there's a flood in our hospital soap opera! Grown-up Tag the firefighter splashes around. It's a good job grown-up Happy the lifeguard is on hand

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S2/E79 - Movies'. It's Bluey's first trip to the cinema, but she's worried the movie will be too scary. When Bingo starts running amok in the theatre, she must conquer her fear and help Dad out.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - Daddy Robot'. Bluey and Bingo don't want to tidy the playroom, so they get Daddy Robot to do it. But when Bluey takes things too far, Daddy Robot malfunctions!

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S3/E137 - Musical Statues'. At the end of a long day, Bluey and her family are out of sync and out of sorts, so Mum gets everyone to play musical statues.

programme.title: Octonauts
programme.desc: 'S2/E7'. The Octonauts help a group of algae-eating fish stand up to some aggressive damselfish, who are harming their own reef by over-farming it with algae.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S2/E55 - Dance Mode'. After Dad eats her last chip, Bingo is given three chances to put Mum and Dad in 'Dance Mode' as payback. But the others can't resist taking Bingo's turns for her.

programme.title: Alphablocks And Numberblocks Mashups
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - Crossover'. Tentacled troublemaker Octonaughty is back! Octoblock and The Exciting X team up to save the day. Learn about the alphabet and adding, codes and cubes with the Alphablocks and the Numberblocks.

programme.title: Alphablocks And Numberblocks Mashups
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - The Case of the Missing Blocks'. Detective One is on the trail of Big Tum as he chomps his way through Alphaland. Yum, yum! Learn about letters and numbers with the Alphablocks and the Numberblocks.

programme.title: Stan Can
programme.desc: 'S1/E28 - Sophie Can Do'. Stanley asks Sophie to help out with a few of his jobs whilst she waits for her dino costume to dry. The pair go about town fixing everyone's problems in fun and imaginative ways.

programme.title: Dog Squad
programme.desc: 'S3/E8 - Mission: Foldy Stick'. Guide dog Kika and her owner Dr Amit are off to the Sticks n' Stuff shop with Amit's friend Alana, who is also blind, to help her buy a new white cane.

programme.title: Supertato
programme.desc: 'S2/E4 - Veg-O-Vision Song Contest'. Supertato and the Tato Team must battle to save Tato Tower from Evil Pea's earth-shaking stomping performance at the Veg-O-Vision Song Contest.

programme.title: Swashbuckle
programme.desc: 'S4/E3 - Swimming Lessons'. Cook and Line are bickering over their beach ball which has fallen into the sea but when Captain Captain orders Line to swim out to fetch it, the pirate reveals that he can't swim!

programme.title: Swashbuckle
programme.desc: 'S2/E12 - The Ship Shop'. Captain Sinker demands that Cook and Line build her a clothes shop so she can buy new outfits. Meanwhile, Cole, Daisy, Grace and Riley try to win back all of Gem's jewels.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - Keepy Uppy'. Bluey, Bingo and Mum are enjoying playing Keepy-Uppy around the house, when Dad joins in and the game becomes the ultimate test of skill.

programme.title: Supertato
programme.desc: 'S1/E28 - Grape Kids' Super Camp'. Supertato shows the Grape Kids how to camp Supertato-style, but Evil Pea arrives and wows them with her ice camping. Before long, the Grape Kids need to be rescued by Supertato.

programme.title: Roots and Fruits
programme.desc: 'S2/E5 - Avocado'. The fabulous Avocados sing an operatic piece in their three unique voices.

programme.title: Octonauts
programme.desc: 'S2/E2'. It's Sea Snakes on an Octopod when a poisonous sea krait lays her eggs in the garden pod, just as Captain Barnacles has to navigate the ship past a treacherous whirlpool.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: 'S1/E90 - Noise'. Tinky Winky, Dipsy, Laa-Laa and Po are trying very hard not to make any noise. Then they make as much noise as possible during the Tubby Phone Dance.

programme.title: Octonauts
programme.desc: 'S2/E3'. Peso must perform an emergency fin bandage on a hungry great white shark, but first they need to subdue the giant predator using a trick called 'tonic immobility.'

programme.title: Octonauts
programme.desc: 'S2/E4'. Kwazii finds a mysterious, unbreakable coconut, so the Octonauts seek out the help of some large, island-dwelling coconut crabs to open it.

programme.title: Clangers
programme.desc: 'S3/E2 - Radio Wol'. The Iron Chicken's radio breaks down, so she and the Wols create their own radio station.

programme.title: JoJo & Gran Gran
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - It's time to catch the bus'. JoJo and Gran Gran miss their bus home, so the pair settle down to wait for the next one. But getting the bus isn't quite as simple as JoJo thinks it is.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S3/E106 - Promises'. Bluey keeps breaking her promises! But after seeing how much Bingo trusts Mum's word, Bluey learns the power of promises and why it's important not to break them.

programme.title: Supertato
programme.desc: 'S1/E19 - Hiccup Havoc'. Supertato gets hiccups while Evil Pea is firing jam at Tato Tower. Supertato harnesses the power of his hiccups to save Tato Tower from Evil Pea's jam attack.

programme.title: Supertato
programme.desc: 'S1/E20 - Dino Danger'. A toy dinosaur rampages in the Supermarket and scares the Grape Kids. Carrot and Supertato work out that it's controlled by a remote control and get the dinosaur back in its box.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S3/E108 - Born Yesterday'. Dad pretends he was born yesterday. Bluey and Bingo have to guide him through his second day on Earth, especially when he discovers food is delicious and steals Lucky's Dad's pie.

programme.title: Octonauts
programme.desc: 'S2/E9'. Barnacles, Kwazii and Peso venture back inside a whale shark to retrieve a Porcupine Puffer Fish that was accidentally swallowed.

programme.title: Octonauts
programme.desc: 'S2/E15'. When he's carried away by a cyclonic waterspout, Kwazii finds himself stranded in the desert-like open ocean with a triggerfish who's made her home underneath the damaged Gup-B.

programme.title: Go Jetters
programme.desc: 'S3/E17 - Svalbard Global Seed Vault, Norway'. Ubercorn and Glitch head to the Svalbard Global Seed Vault. But, just like when they were cadets together, the two of them get into trouble.

programme.title: Octonauts
programme.desc: 'S2/E7'. The Octonauts help a group of algae-eating fish stand up to some aggressive damselfish, who are harming their own reef by over-farming it with algae.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S3/E116 - Pass the Parcel'. Lucky's Dad is outraged that modern Pass the Parcel has a present in every layer and changes the rules back to only having one prize in the middle, but Bingo is forever losing.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club
programme.desc: 'S1/E4'. Billy and the Sillies introduce a visit to chicken A&E, the Squirrels build a bug house, Norrie has her chance to shine, and the Penguins give facts about what's hot and what's not.

programme.title: Mister Maker's Arty Party
programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - Insects'. Join Mister Maker, Scrappz, and the Mini Makers from Birmingham. Find out how to make brilliant bug pictures from torn paper pieces, and see how beetles were once used to create the colour red.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S1/E47 - Neighbours'. Bluey needs her Mum's advice on dealing with a troublesome neighbour, when the serenity of her couch cushion playhouse is threatened by Bingo's own growing stable of animals.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S1/E48 - Teasing'. Bluey, Bingo and Mum get into a debate with Dad about the definition of teasing. As they recall all the times where he's been a Big Teaser, Dad argues that he was only just playing.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S1/E49 - Asparagus'. Dad tells Bluey to mind her manners at the table - they're not animals. But when Bluey gets her hands on a stick of magic asparagus, she shows them everyone's got a wild side.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S1/E50 - Shaun'. Bluey and Bingo want a pet. To show them how much work they'd be in for, Dad gets to transform his hand into their old friend Shaun, a chaotic, undisciplined Emu with a taste for trouble.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S1/E51 - Daddy Putdown'. When Mum goes out to a baby shower, Dad takes charge of the girls' evening routine. But with Bluey missing Mum, Dad has to pull out all the games he knows to keep them entertained.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S1/E27 - Pirates'. It's an adventure on the high seas as Bluey, Bingo and Missy play Pirates on the hammock swing, but they'll need to find their courage to withstand storms and whale attacks.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S1/E28 - Grannies'. A game of 'grannies' is fun, until Bluey and Bingo can't agree on one simple question: Can Grannies dance? Now they need to video call Nana to get the answer.

programme.title: Swashbuckle
programme.desc: 'S7/E3'. The pirates are visited by Captain Captain's arch rival from Strictly Come Pirating, Captain Twinkletoes. Captain Captain is unaware of his forthcoming arrival.

programme.title: Swashbuckle
programme.desc: 'S7/E4'. Captain Captain doesn't think her new crew, Sandy and Seaweed, are up to the job.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - Keepy Uppy'. Bluey, Bingo and Mum are enjoying playing Keepy-Uppy around the house, when Dad joins in and the game becomes the ultimate test of skill.

programme.desc: 'S2/E3 - Ahoy Captain Pak Choi'. Supertato and Broccoli go on a pirate adventure with Captain Pak Choi, but they don't realise she intends on plundering Evil Pea's freezer and stealing all her shiny things.

programme.title: Supertato
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - Cheese Moon'. It's a space race as Supertato helps Carrot fly her baguette rocket to be the first Veggie on the Cheese Moon but half way there Evil Pea crashes into them making them crash land.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S2/E3 - Featherwand'. Bluey and Mum are off to Chloe's party and Bingo isn't invited. But armed with a magic featherwand that makes things incredibly heavy, Bingo can now stop them leaving the house.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club
programme.desc: 'S1/E7'. Betty recalls the first time she pushed the red button, the Squirrels explore a range of emotions with Happy, Angry Bull tells a not-so-sleepy bedtime story, and the gerbils sing.

programme.title: Swashbuckle
programme.desc: 'S5/E5 - Whistleless Whistle'. Captain Captain is surprised to find that her whistle has been replaced with a small fish.

programme.desc: 'S3/E43 - Go Jet Academy: Dream Team Trouble'. After Glitch accidentally destroys part of the Academy, he and Ubercorn have a huge argument. When he heads to Grim HQ to make amends, Ubercorn is accidentally trapped.

programme.desc: 'S3/E115 - Housework'. Mum and Dad vow to only finish their boring housework when the kids stop acting silly, but that's never going to happen, so they end up trying the same approach themselves.

programme.desc: 'S1/E11 - Spooky Day'. Supertato runs in fright when Pumpkin tries to make friends with him, but later realises she needs his help as she's stuck in the air hanging from balloons set up by Evil Pea.

programme.desc: 'S2/E6 - Garlic'. Fitness guru, Garlic, has a set of fun exercises to make you stronger.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Magic Xylophone'. As Bluey and Bingo squabble over their magic xylophone, Dad seizes control and freezes Bluey, leaving Bingo as her only hope.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S1/E5 - Shadowlands'. On a picnic in the park, Bluey and her friends play Shadowlands. Coco keeps taking shortcuts so Bluey has to show her that following the rules can make the game more fun.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S3/E138 - Stories'. Indy thinks she's no good because her model horse looks like a cow, but Calypso encourages her not to give up, so she tries to fix it with a little help from Winton.

programme.title: Octonauts
programme.desc: 'S2/E11'. Peso and Kwazii venture down to the midnight zone to help a hurt creature, but what they find is a shipwreck 'haunted' by a spooky-looking long arm squid.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S2/E53 - Hammerbarn'. On a trip to Hammerbarn, Bluey and Bingo create their own mini-homes side-by-side in the trolley. But Bluey quickly gets jealous of her neighbour, Bingo.

programme.title: Alphablocks
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Band Together'. The Alphablocks are back on the road in a special alphabetical adventure from A to Z. Can they get the band back together in time for the big concert?

programme.title: Stan Can
programme.desc: 'S1/E29 - Mermaid'. Fifi asks Stanley to help them find a Mermaid so they can take its picture for school. They explore the ocean floor in their search where they encounter lots of ocean creatures.

programme.title: Dog Squad
programme.desc: 'S3/E9 - Mission New Neighbour'. Therapy dog Toffee and his owner, Helen, are on a mission to help their new neighbours Kayla the vet and her daughter Tilly on moving-in day.

programme.title: Supertato
programme.desc: 'S2/E5 - Desserts of Destiny'. Evil Pea lures Supertato and Tomato into her cave of frosted doom. Can they find the courage to avoid her traps and retrieve The Lost Candle of Birthdays for Tomato's Museum?

programme.title: Swashbuckle
programme.desc: 'S4/E4 - A Hole Lot of Mess'. Captain Captain arrives on the beach looking shifty, she hastily calls Cook and Line but they soon point out what she's been trying to hide - A big hole in her trousers.

programme.desc: 'S2/E6 - Garlic'. Fitness guru, Garlic, has a set of fun exercises to make you stronger.

programme.title: Octonauts
programme.desc: 'S2/E8'. A mouth-brooding jawfish father has lost his eggs, and the Octonauts must brave strong currents and other obstacles to help get them back to him!

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: 'S1/E110 - Rain'. A cloud appears in Teletubbyland and it rains. Tinky Winky, Dipsy, Laa-Laa and Po watch the flowers bloom. Another cloud appears and it rains pink, Tubby Custard!

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - Up and Down'. Join the dance party with the Teletubbies! Tinky Winky, Dipsy, Laa-Laa and Po dance and sing as they go exploring.

programme.desc: 'S1/E3'. It's fun on the counting train until Naughty Monkey starts to drive! Ethel makes a shape, Frog drops beats with a ribbit song, and Enid turns into anime to chase after a mouse.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: 'S1/E91 - Footprints'. Tinky Winky, Dipsy and Laa-Laa follow a trail of muddy footprints and find Po in bed with very muddy feet. The Noo-Noo cleans off the mud.

programme.title: Octonauts

programme.title: Hey Duggee
programme.desc: 'S5/E3 - The Transport Badge'. When Duggee's old friend Rhodri goes home after a visit, he forgets his favourite hat. The Squirrels take an epic journey to give it back.

programme.desc: 'S2/E86 - Double Babysitter'. Two babysitters turn up to look after Bluey and Bingo!

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S2/E87 - The Quiet Game'. Bluey and Bingo are playing The Quiet Game and won't use words to tell Dad which toy to buy. At his wits end, Dad recruits new store clerk Alfie to help interpret the miming.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S2/E88 - Postman'. When Mum and Dad have a disagreement, Bluey makes Dad write a love letter to Mum to make up. Now Bluey must find a way to deliver the letter to Mum.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S2/E89 - Cafe'. In the park, Bluey meets a new playmate, Winnie, but when Bluey wants to invite her and her dad home for breakfast, she learns that adults take a little bit longer to make friends.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S2/E90 - Muffin Cone'. When Muffin can't stop sucking her thumb, she has to wear a cone of shame. But the cone gets in her way and she can no longer play 'sandwich shop' with Bluey and Bingo.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S2/E91 - Circus'. Bluey is the ringmaster in a game of circus with her friends, but Hercules wants to play his motorcycle game instead. Luckily Bluey has a solution to keep everyone happy.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S2/E92 - Road Trip'. Mum helps Bluey and Bingo find ways to entertain themselves on a family road trip, while Dad tries to stay ahead of the grey nomad convoy or risk camping near the toilets.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S2/E93 - Dunny'. Mum bans the girls from saying the word 'dunny' (toilet), because it's not a word the Queen of England would use, but the kids try and trick her into saying it anyway.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S2/E94 - Duck Cake'. Bluey wants to help Dad make Bingo's birthday cake, but first she must put away her toys. But nothing can tempt her to clean up, until Dad drops the cake.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S2/E95 - Handstand'. At a party, Bingo is desperate to show off her handstand skills, while Nanna can't find a way to make herself useful. They're both feeling a bit lost, until they find each other.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S2/E96 - Helicopter'. Bluey and her friends turn a tree stump into a thrilling game of Helicopter. But as the pilot, Bluey has to learn to give up some control, so they can all have fun.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S2/E97 - Octopus'. When Chloe tries to teach her dad to improvise and play Bluey's game of Octopus at home, he finds it hard to understand, until they realise they can play it their own way.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S2/E98 - Baby Race'. Mum reminisces about Bluey and Judo as babies. Bluey learnt to roll over first, but Judo was the first to crawl, so then it became a race to see who was going to walk first!

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S2/E99 - Mr. Monkeyjocks'. Bluey and Bingo must prove Mr Monkeyjocks is special in order to keep him from getting the chop when Dad suggests a toy chuck out.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S2/E100 - Typewriter'. Bluey, Snickers and Winton are on their way to ask Calypso for help with their problems, when they are ambushed by the Terriers and use their unique talents to get past.

programme.title: Robogobo
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - Birthday Bandit, The/ Let's Hear It for Allie!'. Dax helps Booster stop The Slink from going invisible and ruining a birthday party. When Mönkey Wrënch creates a noisy problem, Allie must be brave to save the day.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S3/E151 - The Sign'. A brand new Bluey episode.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Magic Xylophone'. As Bluey and Bingo squabble over their magic xylophone (that has the power to freeze Dad in space and time) Dad seizes control and freezes Bluey, leaving Bingo as her only hope.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - Hospital'. Doctor Bluey is needed when Dad gets a very curious x-ray from Nurse Bingo. It seems he has a cat in his tummy, leaving Bluey no choice but to operate immediately!

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - Keepy Uppy'. Bluey, Bingo and Mum are enjoying playing Keepy Uppy around the house with their last balloon, when Dad joins in and the game becomes the ultimate test of skill.

programme.title: Superkitties
programme.desc: 'S1/E14 - The Superkitties and a Hole Lot of Trouble/ the Superkitties and the Roboctopus'. Bitsy feels replaced after Sparks makes the SuperKitty Kit super fast to stop the Roboctopus.

programme.title: Superkitties
programme.desc: 'S1/E15 - The Superkitties and the Bird Bop/The Superkitties and the Pickle Problem'. When Pickles keeps lying, the SuperKitties don't believe him when he sees Cat Burglar stealing.

programme.title: Robogobo
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - Birdbath Blizzard/ Wingo's Way'. When Pupsicle freezes a birdbath, RoboGobo must rescue Bob Beaks' flock of birds. Dax and Wingo must get back the team's Robo-Suits from Gimme Pig.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Funhouse
programme.desc: 'S2/E30 - Clarabelle's Pie Day/Minnie's New Puppy'. Clarabelle is overwhelmed by the things she needs to do during Pie Day. Minnie adopts a new puppy and isn't prepared to train her.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - Daddy Robot'. Bluey and Bingo don't want to tidy the playroom, so they get Daddy Robot to do it for them. But when Bluey takes things too far, Daddy Robot malfunctions with disastrous results.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S1/E5 - Shadowlands'. On a picnic in the park, Bluey and her friends play Shadowlands. But when Coco keeps taking shortcuts, Bluey has to show her that following the rules can make the game more fun.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S1/E6 - The Weekend'. At the weekend, Bluey and Bingo are playing in the garden with Dad. But Bingo gets upset, when she discovers a walking leaf insect and Dad is too caught up in the game to notice.

programme.title: PJ Masks
programme.desc: 'S1/E13 - Gekko and the Mighty Moon Problem/Clumsy Catboy'. Romeo creates a space laser to carve his face on the moon. Romeo plans to use a device to make everyone so clumsy that they can't stop him!

programme.title: PJ Masks
programme.desc: 'S1/E14 - Catboy and Gekko's Robot Rampage/Owlette's Feathered Friend'. Romeo's new robot, Robette, decides to take over the world. Owlette wants to be a pet owner.

programme.desc: 'S1/E42 of 51 - 1/42'. After a crushing defeat, Robin Kazami finds himself out of a team, but a chance encounter with Jaxon Cross leads the two to join forces. They set their sights on going pro and claiming their spot at the top.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: 'S1/E17 - Storm Loses Her Mojo/Pop Out!'. After chanting a spell to get in touch with her inner warrior, Blossom unknowingly takes Storm's warrior spirit, making it her own.

programme.title: Cool Catz Legacy
programme.desc: 'S1/E3'. Smarty, Catnap, Wildcat and Kitty hang out in a clubhouse singing songs and using their imaginations. Young viewers are motivated to get up and dance.

programme.title: Cool Catz Legacy
programme.desc: 'S1/E4'. Smarty, Catnap, Wildcat and Kitty hang out in a clubhouse singing songs and using their imaginations. Young viewers are motivated to get up and dance.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends: All Engines Go
programme.desc: 'S26/E18 - Thomas In Charge'. When Gordon leaves Thomas in charge for the day, Thomas uses the chance to prove his leadership skills. As problems arise, Thomas learns that leadership is about more than just being boss.

programme.title: Let's Go Luna!
programme.desc: 'S1/E66 of 76 - Movie Monday'. Carmen wants to see a movie in Bangkok, but when there's a power outage, Luna takes her to see a shadow puppet performance instead.

programme.title: Poppy Cat
programme.desc: 'S1/E35 - Bad Robot'. When Rocket-Cat is trapped on the Ice Planet, the gang blasts off to rescue him. They defeat the robot with Zuzu's space karate and Mo's remote, saving the day from Professor Monkeynuts.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! And The Chipmunks
programme.desc: 'S1/E151 - Alvin's Got A Brand New Bag'. Alvin accidentally ruins Brittany's new bag and must find a way to replace this one of a kind fashion pieces. After many failures, he puts his reputation at risk!

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! And The Chipmunks
programme.desc: 'S1/E152 - Warbie'. The Chipmunks find a baby bird that fell from its nest. Alvin is reluctant to get too attached but the little bird worms his way into Alvin's hat and heart, creating an unlikely friendship.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! And The Chipmunks
programme.desc: 'S2/E113 - Wax Dave'. The Chipmunks follow Dave and fear that he's fallen in love with a woman who wants to turn him into a wax statue!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: 'S2/E10 - Mission To Caturn'. When CatRat gets stuck on planet Caturn, it's up to Gabby and Pandy to go save him. DJ Catnip teaches them a song to remember how to get there and Baby Box helps them make jetpacks so they can zip around.

programme.title: Trollstopia
programme.desc: 'S1/E18 - The Party Pooper/My Dinner With Dante'. Dante Crescendo opens a fancy new restaurant, introducing TrollsTopia to fine Classical dining.

programme.title: Angry Birds Summer Camp Madness
programme.desc: 'S2/E11 - Fly Like A Mighty Eagle'. When Chuck sees Mighty Eagle in flight, he longs to join the Eagles in the sky. But birds can't fly or can they?

programme.title: Angry Birds Summer Camp Madness
programme.desc: 'S2/E12 - The Sabirdteur'. Stella's competitive spirit leads her into danger when she challenges Terence to a game of Tetherbird. If she beats him, he'll clobber her.

programme.title: Barbie: A Touch Of Magic
programme.desc: 'S1/E10 - Tiny Problems'. Rocki tricks Skipper into auditioning for a reality TV show in order to steal Peggy. Barbie and Barbie are shrunk to tiny sizes and must escape Tiger to warn Skipper.

programme.title: Open Season: Call Of Nature
programme.desc: 'S1/E50 of 52 - Mukluck'. Elliot finds a creature he believes to be a good luck charm, but actually is the source of terrible misfortune for the rest of the camp.

programme.title: The Jungle Bunch To The Rescue!
programme.desc: 'S1/E51 - The Stars Stone'. Roger the gardener is looking for the Jungle Bunch as his garden has been invaded. Dhoom and his gang are observing a big stone in the middle of Roger's garden.

programme.title: The Jungle Bunch To The Rescue!
programme.desc: 'S1/E52 - The Jungle Bunch Behind The Wheel'. It's the mandrills vs. the koalas in a car race, with the loser leaving the jungle.

programme.title: The Jungle Bunch To The Rescue!
programme.desc: 'S2/E1 - The Cube'. Master Hector comes to visit the Jungle Bunch: a cube radiating a blue light creates a discord in the Jungle. All the animals claim that the cube belongs to them.

programme.title: All Hail King Julien
programme.desc: 'S1/E20 - The Man In The Iron Booty'. King Julien sends his entire kingdom away on rafts to help an alleged fellow king who is supposedly in distress.

programme.title: All Hail King Julien
programme.desc: 'S1/E21 - Monkey Planet'. King Julien declares that lemurs will land on the moon and seeks help from a former astronaut: Stanislav, the Russian Space Monkey.

programme.title: Angry Birds Summer Camp Madness
programme.desc: 'S2/E2 - A Knight's Tailfeathers'. It's Medieval Weekend at camp, and King Neiderflyer is taking his pretend crown a little too seriously. It's up to Sir Stella to unseat the devious despot.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK World-Japan's flagship news programme delivers the latest world news, business and weather with a focus on Japan and the rest of Asia.

programme.title: Nhk World Tv Special Programme
programme.desc: NHK World-Japan presents news, current affairs, and documentaries focusing on Japan and Asia.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK World-Japan's flagship news programme delivers the latest world news, business and weather with a focus on Japan and the rest of Asia.

programme.title: Tradition Inspires A Green Future
programme.desc: Aditya Sharma seeks a sustainable balance between protecting the planet and meeting consumer demand for clothing - he explores a Japanese tradition in the hopes of finding inspiration.

programme.title: Japan's Top Inventions
programme.desc: Discover the stories behind renowned Japanese products alongside our reporter - this time, frozen food vending machines.

programme.title: Japanology Plus
programme.desc: Deep dives into cultural phenomena with Peter Barakan, a bilingual British broadcaster based in Japan since 1974 - Peter discovers something new about Japan in every episode.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK World-Japan's flagship news programme delivers the latest world news, business and weather with a focus on Japan and the rest of Asia.

programme.title: Documentary 360
programme.desc: Japanese-American Takeshi Furumoto, born in an incarceration camp and raised in Hiroshima after the atomic bombing, fought in the Vietnam War - he travels in search of closure to his complicated past.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK World-Japan's flagship news programme delivers the latest world news, business and weather with a focus on Japan and the rest of Asia.

programme.title: Broadcasters' Eye
programme.desc: We bring you prestigious award-winning programmes produced by broadcasters across Japan in this series.

programme.title: Japan From Above: Up Close
programme.desc: This programme takes you on an aerial journey across 21st-century Japan. Enjoy the bird's-eye view of unique landscapes as well as intimate portraits of the people who inhabit the archipelago.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK World-Japan's flagship news programme delivers the latest world news, business and weather with a focus on Japan and the rest of Asia.

programme.title: Train Cruise
programme.desc: Criss-cross Japan by rail - enjoy an amazing diversity of nature and scenery across the four seasons, exploring both the well-known and the hidden Japan.

programme.title: Japanology Plus Mini
programme.desc: NHK World-Japan presents a variety of short programmes focusing on Japan and Asia.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK World-Japan's flagship news programme delivers the latest world news, business and weather with a focus on Japan and the rest of Asia.

programme.title: Design X Stories
programme.desc: Crafts, fashion, products, buildings and food: explore a diverse range of Japanese designs and the ideas and values of their creators as our presenters visit designers at work to reveal new stories.

programme.title: Viewpoint Science
programme.desc: This proactive science education programme encourages primary and lower secondary school children to discover and investigate the mysteries which puzzle them.

programme.title: Story Land
programme.desc: Leading actors take turns as solo storytellers to act and recite traditional folk tales loved in Japan for centuries - watch out for some delightful illustrations too!

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK World-Japan's flagship news programme delivers the latest world news, business and weather with a focus on Japan and the rest of Asia.

programme.title: Time And Tide
programme.desc: This programme transcends time to detail extraordinary historical events in Japan and the world - join NHK World-Japan on a journey that reveals the truth behind some of the turning points of history.

programme.title: My Street Piano
programme.desc: NHK World-Japan presents a variety of short programmes focusing on Japan and Asia.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK World-Japan's flagship news programme delivers the latest world news, business and weather with a focus on Japan and the rest of Asia.

programme.title: Nhk World Tv Special Programme
programme.desc: NHK World-Japan presents news, current affairs, and documentaries focusing on Japan and Asia.

programme.title: Hit The Road 5min.
programme.desc: Let's see Japan by car! We drive through Hiroshima Prefecture with our goal being the famed Itsukushima Shrine, along the way, we make a few stops off the beaten path that will amaze you!

programme.title: Bosai: Science That Can Save Your Life
programme.desc: Japan has a long history of natural disasters - Bosai explores how to overcome them and save lives with the power of science.

programme.desc: NHK World-Japan presents a variety of short programmes focusing on Japan and Asia.

programme.title: Passing The Torch Of Peace
programme.desc: The key to achieving peace is feeling the pain of others - it's an idea Hayashida Mitsuhiro picked up from hibakusha in his native Nagasaki, and one he tries to teach young visitors to his city.

programme.title: Ukiyo-e Edo-Life
programme.desc: Centuries ago, Tokyo was known as Edo - more than a million people enjoyed life in this city, and they live on in ukiyo-e woodblock prints. Take a deep dive into ukiyo-e and explore old Tokyo's soul.

programme.desc: The key to achieving peace is feeling the pain of others - it's an idea Hayashida Mitsuhiro picked up from hibakusha in his native Nagasaki, and one he tries to teach young visitors to his city.

programme.title: Ukiyo-e Edo-Life
programme.desc: Centuries ago, Tokyo was known as Edo - more than a million people enjoyed life in this city, and they live on in ukiyo-e woodblock prints. Take a deep dive into ukiyo-e and explore old Tokyo's soul.

programme.title: Matsuri: The Heartbeat Of Japan
programme.desc: Yoshida Ryusei, an October matsuri, features rockets called ryusei that are made by local teams and carry community prayers high in the sky - team members pour heart and soul into their efforts.

programme.title: Seasoning The Seasons
programme.desc: This programme visits places across Japan to introduce the charms of their local daily life and festivals fostered by the nation's long history.

programme.title: NHK Newsline

programme.title: Medical Frontiers
programme.desc: Researchers in Japan are gathering scientific evidence on the effects of acupuncture and moxibustion - we examine how they improve stroke aftereffects, atopic dermatitis and other issues.
